NORMAL_CHEAT_TOGGLE_DESC: Select the cheat or trainer exe file from storage
ADVANCED_DXVK_ASYNC_DESC: Optimizes Proton-GE compatibility layer to reduce frame time and input latency
ADVANCED_RADV_PERFTEST_DESC: Optimizes Proton-GE compatibility layer shader cache behavior
ADVANCED_STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH_DESC: Customize a path to save compatibility data for games, including saves
ADVANCED_LOSSLESS_SCALING_DESC: Enable LSFG-VK frame generation (requires Lossless-Scaling and decky-lsfg-vk plugin)
ADVANCED_DECKY_FRAMEGEN_PATCH_DESC: Disguise DLSS input to use FSR upscaling and frame generation (requires Decky-Framegen plugin)
ADVANCED_DECKY_FRAMEGEN_UNPATCH_DESC: Run once to uninstall the OptiScaler patch (requires Decky-Framegen plugin)
